---
title: "Class 19: Cancer Mutation Analysis"
author: "Cyrus Shabahang (PID: 19145663)"
format: html
---

>Q2. What are the tumor specific mutations in this particular case ( e.g. A130V)?

```{r}
library(bio3d)

a <- read.fasta("A19145663_mutant_seq.fa")
```

```{r}
x <- readLines("A19145663_mutant_seq.fa")

hdr <- grep("^>", x)

seqs <- sapply(seq_along(hdr), function(i) {
  start <- hdr[i] + 1
  end <- if (i < length(hdr)) hdr[i + 1] - 1 else length(x)
  paste(x[start:end], collapse = "")
})

names(seqs) <- sub("^>", "", x[hdr])

wt <- strsplit(seqs["wt_healthy"], "")[[1]]
tumor <- strsplit(seqs["mutant_tumor"], "")[[1]]

pos <- which(wt != tumor)
mutations <- paste0(wt[pos], pos, tumor[pos])

mutations
```
